subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims from India, spoken on 1914-04-22
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the news received from all parts indicate the fact that the believers of God are striving in the promulgation of the Cause of God.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause
